components.name: AIX 7.2
components.notes: IBM AIX 7.2 extended support ended ~April 2025. No further security patches.

components.name: COBOL-2014
components.notes: COBOL-2014 is a stable ISO standard; vendor runtime support varies by platform. No definitive EOL date known.

components.name: Oracle 19c
components.notes: Oracle 19c Long-Term Support until April 2027. Currently in Extended Support window.

components.name: None
components.notes: No application server configured for this application.

summary: ERPApp-001 runs on EOL AIX 7.2 and uses COBOL-2014 with unknown vendor support. Oracle 19c database is approaching EOL in 2027. High modernization risk due to legacy COBOL codebase on proprietary AIX platform.
